lesson.menu_desc: Recap decisions and assign action items -- who does what by when -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Closing the Meeting -- Summarizing & Action Items
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Percival JR | Aula 13 -- Closing the Meeting

listenings.text: Alright, everyone, we are at the end of the meeting, so let me recap. First, we made two decisions today. We will use the new supplier, and we will move the launch to October. Now, the action items. Karen, you will send the final report by Friday. You are the owner of that task. Daniel, you will confirm the budget with the board by Monday. I will follow up with both of you on Tuesday. Those are our next steps. Thank you all, and I will see you next week.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I am calling about my action item from the meeting. You asked me to send the final report by Friday, and I am the owner of that task. I have good news. I will finish it by Thursday instead, one day early. Could you confirm one thing for me, please? Is Daniel still going to confirm the budget by Monday? I want to add his number to the report. Thank you, and I will follow up by email today. Bye.

extra_audio.text: First, Percival closes the meeting and starts the recap. Then, he summarizes the two decisions of the day. After that, he assigns the action items to each owner. Later, he sets a deadline for every task with by Friday and by Monday. Finally, he says he will follow up and confirms the next steps.
